zh.Saint Dunstan, Stepney, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hodsoll於1555年出生在英國素可黑曼波瑞時，他的父親John Hodsoll I21歲，母親Faith Thomas17歲。他於大約1579年與Anne Maundy在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年11月1日在英國素可考福爾德享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可考福爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hodsoll于1555年出生在英国素可黑曼波瑞时，他的父亲John Hodsoll I21岁，母亲Faith Thomas17岁。他于大约1579年与Anne Maundy在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年11月1日在英国素可考福爾德享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可考福爾德。

meanings: English: locative name from Hodsoll (Staffs) or Hodsoll Street in Ash (Kent).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Hodsoll was born in 1555, in Shermanbury, Sussex, England, his father, John Hodsoll I, was 21 and his mother, Faith Thomas, was 17. He married Anne Maundy about 1579, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 1 November 1617, in Cowfold, Sussex, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Cowfold, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hodsoll est né en 1555, à Shermanbury, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Hodsoll I, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Faith Thomas, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Anne Maundy environ 1579, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1617, à Cowfold, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Cowfold, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hodsoll 1555 in Shermanbury, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hodsoll I 21 und seine Mutter Faith Thomas 17. Er hat um 1579 in England, United Kingdom Anne Maundy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 1. November 1617 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Cowfold, Sussex, England und wurde in Cowfold, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hodsoll è nato il nel 1555 nel Shermanbury, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Hodsoll I, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Faith Thomas, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Anne Maundy circa 1579, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1617, nel Cowfold, Sussex, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Cowfold, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hodsollが1555年にイギリススセックスシェルマンブリーで生まれた時，父John Hodsoll Iは21歳，母Faith Thomasは17歳であった。約1579年にイギリスイギリスでAnne Maundyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年11月1日にイギリススセックスコウフォルドで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスコウフォルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hodsoll(이)가 1555년 영국 수세스 셔먼버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hodsoll I(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Faith Thomas(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1579년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Anne Maundy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 11월 1일 영국 수세스 코우폴드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 코우폴드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hodsoll nasceu em 1555, em Shermanbury, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hodsoll I, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Faith Thomas, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Maundy aproximadamente 1579, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1617, em Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Dunstan's, Stepney, London, England: сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hodsoll родился в 1555 г. в местности ширманбури, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hodsoll I было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Faith Thomas, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Maundy около 1579 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 1 ноября 1617 г. в местности коуфолд, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности коуфолд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.St Dunstan's, Stepney, London, England: Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hodsoll nació en 1555, en Shermanbury, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hodsoll I, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Faith Thomas, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Anne Maundy aproximadamente 1579, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1617, en Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
